_note: Shelf 3D look config = single source of truth. Defaults are baked INLINE in engine/goods-sort.html as SHELF_DEFAULTS (the single self-contained HTML works offline without this file). The engine also merges an override from localStorage['gs_shelf_config'] (the editor's save) on top of the defaults. This JSON mirrors the current defaults for reference/commit. To change the game's default look: edit it live in editor/shelf3d.html, click '설정 복사' (or Export .json), and paste the JSON into BOTH SHELF_DEFAULTS in the engine AND this file.

_units.perspective: px — per-niche perspective distance (작을수록 강한 원근/입체)
_units.eyeY: fraction of cubby height — PER-CUBBY perspective-origin Y (0.5=정중앙, <0.5=위에서 내려다봐 바닥 더 보임). 0.20=look-down, 바닥면 보임. (전역 카메라 높이는 cameraHeight.)
_units.sideReveal: V20 — BACK-COMPAT ALIAS for wallOuterReveal. A legacy config with only sideReveal migrates into wallOuterReveal (the OUTER side-wall reveal).
_units.wallOuterReveal: V20 — 0..1.3 mult on the OUTER (center-away, '중앙을 등지는') side-wall depth. Default 0.5 (= old sideReveal). Scaled per-cubby by the center-distance falloff (wallFalloff): center column ≈ 0, edge columns the OUTER wall sliver.
_units.wallCenterReveal: V20 — 0..1.3 mult on the CENTER-FACING (toward board center, '중앙을 바라보는') side-wall depth. Default 0 = hidden (current OUTER-only look). Each cubby's two side walls are INDEPENDENT.
_units.wallFalloff: V20 — 0.3..3 exponent: per-cubby factor = distFrac^wallFalloff (distFrac = |cubbyCx−boardCx| / (gridW/2)). Higher = walls vanish FASTER toward center ('중앙으로 올수록 벽면이 얼마나 안보일지'). Center column ≈ 0.
_units.depth: fraction of min(cubbyW,cubbyH) — BASE box depth D (선반 깊이/길이). floorDepth/frameCeilingDepth multiply this for those faces.
_units.floorDepth: V20 — 0.2..1.5 multiplier on EACH cubby's FLOOR face depth ('각 그리드의 바닥면 깊이') = depth × floorDepth.
_units.frameCeilingDepth: V20 — 0.2..1.5 multiplier on the FRAME top/CEILING face depth ('프레임의 천장면 깊이') = depth × ceilingVisibility × frameCeilingDepth.
_units.shelfAngle: degrees — floor/ceiling fold angle (선반각도; 90=직각 박스, 작을수록 윗/아랫면 더 보임)
_units.cameraAngle: V20 — degrees, GLOBAL board tilt (board-level rotateX on #shelf). Default 0 = upright (no backward lean). Distinct from the per-cubby eyeY.
_units.cameraHeight: V20 — 0..1 GLOBAL camera height for the WHOLE board (board perspective-origin Y / #shelf transform-origin Y). 0.5 = centered.
_units.postThickness: px — divider/post gap width between cubbies (기둥 두께)
_units.frameThickness: px — outer cabinet wood frame thickness (프레임 두께)
_units.ceilingVisibility: multiplier on ceiling band depth (윗면; 0=숨김 기본, 바닥면만 보임). Combined with frameCeilingDepth.
_units.goodFillHeight: fraction of cubby interior — good height (굿즈 크기)
_units.cubbyAspect: shelf aspect-ratio is 1/cubbyAspect (cubby 가로:세로; <1=가로로 넓은 칸)
_units.rimH: px — front-rim band thickness (앞 턱 나무 두께)
_units.goodGap: fraction of cubby width — horizontal gap between adjacent goods (굿즈 간격). Each of the 3 front slots is a uniform cell (cubbyW/3); a good is scaled (real aspect preserved) to fit within cellW - goodGap*cubbyW and centered -> thin goods sit centered with side padding, NO overlap.
_units.lightAngle: degrees — DIRECTIONAL light source angle (라이트 각도). 315=TOP-LEFT light -> shadows fall BOTTOM-RIGHT (dx>0,dy>0). Drives every shadow (good drop-shadows + each cubby's inner shading).
_units.shadowStrength: 0..1 — directional shadow opacity (그림자 진하기). Higher = darker/heavier shadows.
_units.backDim: fraction — back-row (peek) goods brightness (뒷줄 어둡기). 0.4 = VERY dark (deep interior shadow behind the front row, per reference); front goods stay full brightness. Depth-based (not cast-shadow): back/peek goods read dark regardless of a front good's presence.
_units.topShadow: fraction — SHALLOW top inner-shadow strength (천장 그림자). A faint dark band along the TOP edge of each cubby interior (ceiling drop-shadow into the recess). Kept SHALLOW; actual opacity = shadowStrength * topShadow * 0.6.
_units.gridColor: V20 — hex wood TINT color (그리드 나무 색, COLOR PICKER). Multiplied over the wood grain (frame + planks + dividers + side walls) and NORMALIZED against the default tone (#caa06a) so the default = no change (current look); a different color recolors all grid wood while keeping the grain.
